_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: ileniaperrella
data.message:
Merge branch 'mca/new_frame_wbc' into 'humble-devel'

new frame for wbc addedd

See merge request robots/tiago_pro_head_robot!26

files.patch:
@@ -209,4 +209,12 @@
     <parent link="sellion_link"/>
   </joint>
 
+  <link name="head_front_camera_color_eye_frame"/>
+
+  <joint name="color_eye_joint" type="fixed">
+    <origin xyz="-0.000 -0.059 -0.000" rpy="-1.566 0.002 -1.568"/>
+    <child link="head_front_camera_color_eye_frame" />
+    <parent link="head_front_camera_link"/>
+  </joint>
+
 </robot>

@@ -217,4 +217,12 @@
     <parent link="head_front_camera_link"/>
   </joint>
 
+  <link name="head_front_camera_depth_eye_frame"/>
+
+  <joint name="depth_eye_joint" type="fixed">
+    <origin xyz="0.000 0.000 0.000" rpy="-1.571 0.000 -1.571"/>
+    <child link="head_front_camera_depth_eye_frame" />
+    <parent link="head_front_camera_link"/>
+  </joint>
+
 </robot>

data.author: Noel215
data.message:
Merge branch 'fix/default_controller_module' into 'humble-devel'

Update module priority

See merge request robots/tiago_pro_head_robot!10

files.patch:
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ ament_auto_find_build_dependencies()
 
 if(pal_module_cmake_FOUND)
   pal_register_modules(
-    module/20_default_controllers.yaml
+    module/10_default_controllers.yaml
   )
 elseif(DEFINED ENV{PAL_DISTRO})
   message(FATAL_ERROR "The pal_module_cmake package was not found. Modules not registered.")

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ ament_auto_find_build_dependencies()
 
 if(pal_module_cmake_FOUND)
   pal_register_modules(
-    module/20_robot_state_publisher.yaml
+    module/10_robot_state_publisher.yaml
   )
 elseif(DEFINED ENV{PAL_DISTRO})
   message(FATAL_ERROR "The pal_module_cmake package was not found. Modules not registered.")

@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@
   <exec_depend>tiago_pro_head_controller_configuration</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>tiago_pro_head_description</exec_depend>
   <exec_depend>play_motion2</exec_depend>
+  <exec_depend>play_motion2_cli</exec_depend>
 
   <test_depend>ament_lint_auto</test_depend>
   <test_depend>ament_lint_common</test_depend>

@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.8)
+project(pal_pro_head_bringup)
+
+if(CMAKE_COMPILER_IS_GNUCXX OR CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "Clang")
+  add_compile_options(-Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic)
+endif()
+
+# find dependencies
+find_package(ament_cmake REQUIRED)
+# uncomment the following section in order to fill in
+# further dependencies manually.
+# find_package(<dependency> REQUIRED)
+
+if(BUILD_TESTING)
+  find_package(ament_lint_auto REQUIRED)
+  # the following line skips the linter which checks for copyrights
+  # comment the line when a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_copyright_FOUND TRUE)
+  # the following line skips cpplint (only works in a git repo)
+  # comment the line when this package is in a git repo and when
+  # a copyright and license is added to all source files
+  set(ament_cmake_cpplint_FOUND TRUE)
+  ament_lint_auto_find_test_dependencies()
+endif()
+
+ament_package()

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@

+  # a copyright and license is added to all source files

   <xacro:arg name="camera_model" default="realsense-d435"/>
   <xacro:arg name="use_sim_time" default="false"/>
   <xacro:arg name="is_public_sim" default="false"/>
+  <xacro:arg name="namespace" default=""/>
 
   <xacro:property name="camera_model" value="$(arg camera_model)" />
   <xacro:property name="use_sim_time" value="$(arg use_sim_time)" />
   <xacro:property name="is_public_sim" value="$(arg is_public_sim)" />
+  <xacro:property name="namespace" value="$(arg namespace)" />
     <!-- ROS 2 Control -->
   <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_pro_head_description)/ros2_control/ros2_control.urdf.xacro" />
   <xacro:tiago_pro_head_ros2_control/>

data.author: matteovillani-star
data.message: let the head shake instead of nod

files.patch:
@@ -35,7 +35,7 @@
         joints: [head_1_joint, head_2_joint]
         times_from_start: [0.1, 0.8, 1.6]
         positions: [0.0,  0.0, 
-                    0.0, -0.3, 
+                    -0.4, 0.0, 
                     0.0,  0.0,]
         meta:
           name: Head Shake

data.author: doterkuile
data.message: Fix path for ros2 controller gazebo cfg file

files.patch:
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
     <xacro:if value="$(arg use_sim_time)">
       <gazebo>
         <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros2_control.so" name="gazebo_ros2_control">
-          <parameters>$(find tiago_pro_description)/ros2_control/gazebo_controller_manager_cfg.yaml</parameters>
+          <parameters>$(find tiago_pro_head_description)/ros2_control/gazebo_controller_manager_cfg.yaml</parameters>
         </plugin>
       </gazebo>
       <ros2_control name="ros2_control_head_gazebo_system" type="system">
